16.kj: [idiom] at all, [idiom] crying, (be) dead (body, man, one), (put to, worthy of) death, destroy(-er), (cause to, be like to, must) die, kill, necro(-mancer), [idiom] must needs, sla

16.gl: father, in a literal and immediate, or figurative and remote application
16.kj: chief, (fore-) father(-less), [idiom] patrimony, principal. Compare names in 'Abi-'.

17.kj: [idiom] at all, band, bring forth, (deal) corrupt(-ly), destroy, offend, lay to (take a) pledge, spoil, travail, [idiom] very, withhold.

17.gl: a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage
17.kj: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

17.gl: properly, a guest; by implication, a foreigner
a widow; also a desolate place
